articles.title: Cardano Founder Charles Hoskinson Criticizes Peter Schiff’s Bitcoin Knowledge
articles.description: Cardano founder Charles Hoskinson has publicly criticized Peter Schiff’s understanding of Bitcoin. Peter Schiff, known for his anti-Bitcoin stance, has often voiced his skepticism about the cryptocurrency. In a series of recent X posts, Schiff has called BTC a “pyramid scheme” scam. However, Hoskinson’s recent remarks highlight the ongoing debate between crypto advocates and skeptics.
